field_values.action_summary: A soldier with green whiskers is summoned. He suggests seeking Glinda, the Good Witch of the South, but warns of the dangers of the desert road. The group accepts the challenge and resolves to leave the next morning.
field_values.camera_intent: Medium shot of the Soldier delivering the warning; Group reaction shots (nodding in agreement); Final wide shot of the group planning departure
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Lighting must shift from daytime to evening/dusk as characters plan for next morning
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH018_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the new quest direction toward Glinda and heighten stakes via the desert road warning. The scene must transition from a state of uncertainty to resolute courage as the group commits to an early departure.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- soldier (with green whiskers)

## Required Environments
- emerald_city_throne_room

## Continuity Constraints
- Lighting must shift from daytime to evening/dusk as characters plan for next morning.

## Beat List
- BT001: Soldier delivers warning about Glinda and the desert road.
- BT002: Group processes danger and accepts challenge.
- BT003: Resolution to leave the next morning.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
